prompt: Create a polished SFW anime-style illustration of Gilgamesh and Enkidu having an elegant dinner together in a luxury high-rise restaurant at night. The composition is a medium two-shot at a white table: on the left sits a blond young man in a sleek black suit, black shirt, black tie, gold earrings, and a decorative gold lapel pin, leaning his cheek on one hand with a relaxed, slightly amused posture; on the right sits a long-haired green-haired young man in a crisp white suit and white shirt, wearing delicate necklaces, turned toward the blond man in quiet conversation. Their faces are intentionally covered by two plain opaque square blocks in muted beige tones, one over each face, while the rest of the characters remain detailed. The table contains exactly 8 visible dining elements: 1 plated steak entree in front of the blond man, 1 plated gourmet seafood or dumpling-style entree in front of the green-haired man, 1 red wine glass, 2 white wine glasses, 1 lit candle in a small glass holder, 1 metallic vase of white flowers and greenery, and visible silverware beside the plates. Set the scene against floor-to-ceiling windows showing a dark blue city skyline, scattered building lights, a bright full moon, and a large warm chandelier reflected above them. Use warm candlelit golden lighting with cool moonlit city contrast, refined romantic restaurant atmosphere, cinematic depth of field, detailed fabric folds, glossy wine glass reflections, soft bokeh, high-end visual novel key art quality, 16:9 horizontal canvas, no text, no watermark.
